form.formComment: Racing well recently. Last start 4th of 9 at Rosehill in the G1 Vinerystud on March 28 over 2000m, slow going 0.8 len behind Belle Cheval with 56kg at $2.70. The start before that settled well back; won by 2.25 len at Ellerslie G1 Nz Oaks February 21 over 2400m in soft going defeating Autumn Glory carrying 56.5kg at $2.60. Ready to bounce back over this trip.
